name: recyclerview-best-practice
description: Android RecyclerView best practices for adapter selection, diffing, paging, state, and performance.

interface.shortDescription: Review and implement robust Android RecyclerView code.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex to prefer diff-capable adapters, correct lifecycle collection, stable binding patterns, item state separation, and focused tests when editing Android RecyclerView code.
defaultPrompt: Refactor this adapter to use diffing.
Add Paging 3 support to this list.
